author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Rumor: Nintendo has a new Wario game on the way

Rumor has it that Nintendo has some sort of new Wario game in development. The speculation comes from noarmsandnolegs, who made the claim on social media. We don’t have any details on the project currently. noarmsandnolegs also said that if there is a Nintendo Direct week – which could take place as early as Tuesday – the Wario game isn’t...

The post Rumor: Nintendo has a new Wario game on the way appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Valheim receives Nintendo Switch 2 release date, new trailer

Valheim now has its release date on Nintendo Switch 2. Today, it was announced that the title arrives on September 9, 2026. You may recall that Valheim was confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2 during a Nintendo Direct. When Valheim comes to Nintendo Switch 2, this will be a part of the game’s proper 1.0 launch. A slew of details can...

The post Valheim receives Nintendo Switch 2 release date, new trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Sea of Stars gets a Nintendo Switch 2 version

Sea of Stars is receiving a dedicated Nintendo Switch 2 version. That’s according to a listing on the Japanese Nintendo eShop. It’s already live on the store with other regions to follow – likely tomorrow. Sea of Stars previously launched on Nintendo Switch. Note that the new release is not a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, so save data will not...

The post Sea of Stars gets a Nintendo Switch 2 version appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Thief: The Dark Project Remastered announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

During the PC Gamer Show today, it was announced that Thief: The Dark Project Remastered is coming to both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. A release is planned for this winter. Eidos originally made Thief: The Dark Project in 1998. The first-person stealth game will now be updated in the KEX Engine with the base game plus the additional missions,...

The post Thief: The Dark Project Remastered announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Cassette Beasts 2002, a follow-up to the original Cassette Beasts, revealed for Nintendo Switch 2

Cassette Beasts 2002 is in development for Nintendo Switch 2, Raw Fury and Cassette Beasts 2002 have revealed. The game’s release date will be shared later. This is a follow-up to the original Cassette Beasts. The open-world RPG previously came to Nintendo Switch in 2023. In the follow-up, it’ll be possible to fuse with over 240 beasts. Additionally, any two...

The post Cassette Beasts 2002, a follow-up to the original Cassette Beasts, revealed for Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Crazy Taxi: World Tour uses generative AI during development

You can add Crazy Taxi: World Tour to the lineup of games that’s using generative AI during development. That piece of information comes from the game’s official Steam page. SEGA just announced the game, and in the description on the store page, it includes a note about AI usage. SEGA describes its implementation as follows: “At SEGA Corporation, we utilize...

The post Crazy Taxi: World Tour uses generative AI during development appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse won’t be on Nintendo Switch at launch

Konami and Evil Empire just set the release date for Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse today, but those interested in the Nintendo Switch version will need to wait a bit longer for the game. On most platforms, the title is coming on October 15, 2026. However, in the most recent trailer, Konami confirms that the Nintendo Switch version is launching in 2026. What...

The post Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse won’t be on Nintendo Switch at launch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 details DMZ, a new extraction shooter mode [update: trailer]

June 6: Today, Activision and Infinity Ward announced a new “DMZ” feature for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. This is the game’s shooter extraction mode. DMZ combines narrative-driven story missions, side operations, player-driven encounters, and match-to-match progression.  Thanks to Activision’s blog, we have the following details: DMZ is the definitive Call of Duty extraction experience: a living combat sandbox...

The post Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 details DMZ, a new extraction shooter mode [update: trailer] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tom Kenny confirmed to be returning as the voice of Spyro in Spyro: A Realm Beyond

We have one more notable detail about the just-announced Spyro: A Realm Beyond, which is that Tom Kenny will again be the voice of Spyro. At this point, the game wouldn’t be complete without Kenny’s involvement. He’s been playing the character since Spyro 2: Ripto’s Rage. Kenny has had an absolutely legendary career across gaming, television, and more. His other...

The post Tom Kenny confirmed to be returning as the voice of Spyro in Spyro: A Realm Beyond appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond revealed, coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Today, Activision and Toys for Bob announced Spyro: A Realm Beyond, and it’s coming to Nintendo Switch 2. It’ll be out in Spring 2027. This is the first brand new Spyro game since The Legend of Spyro: Dawn of the Dragon in 2008. Spyro Reignited Trilogy, a remake compilation of the franchise’s first three entries, previously released on Nintendo Switch....

The post Spyro: A Realm Beyond revealed, coming to Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
